system.notes: Game notes (Chromebook 3 p.5): eliminates the 'Complex Repair/Lock', 'Don't have right tools' and 'Hostile environment' difficulty penalties based on size/scale, and gives +1 to Cyber Tech, Electronics, Cybermodem Design and Weaponsmith rolls in situations of appropriate size/scale. Requires an MLINK neural processor module; non-portable. Four skills share the +1, so apply it in the modifiers window for the skill in use.
